author: śrīla narottama⋅dāsa ṭhākura
verses:
śrī⋅rūpa⋅paścāte āmi rahiba bhīta hañā
dohe punaḥ kahibena āmā pāne cāñā

sadaya⋅hṛdaye dohe kahibena hāsi
kothāya pāile rūpa! ei nava dāsī

śrī-rūpa-mañjarī tabe dohavākya śuni
mañjunālī dila more ei dāsī āni’

ati namracitta āmi ihāre jānila
sevākārya niyā tabe hethāya rākhila

hena tattva dohākāra sākṣāte kahiyā
narottame sevāya dibe niyukta kariyā
en_translation:
I will remain behind Śrī Rūpa, being afraid. Both will again say, looking at me.

Smiling with kind hearts, Both will say: "Where did you get this new maidservant, Rūpa?"

Then Śrī Rūpa Mañjarī, hearing the words of Both: "Mañjunālī brought this maidservant and gave her to me.

I knew her to be very humble in heart; therefore I kept her here engaged in service."

Speaking such truths in the presence of Both, she will engage Narottama in service.
